SAMPLE ACT
CAP. 999

An Act of Parliament to establish the Sample Authority and to provide
for matters connected therewith

PART I – PRELIMINARY .......................................................................... 1
1. Short title ............................................................................................. 1
2. Interpretation ......................................................................................... 1
PART II – ESTABLISHMENT .................................................................... 2
3. Establishment of the Authority ............................................................. 2
3A. Powers of the Authority ..................................................................... 2
PART III – FINANCE ............................................................................... 3
4. Funds of the Authority .......................................................................... 3
4A. [Repealed by Act No. 5 of 2010, s. 2.] ................................................ 3
4B. Annual estimates ................................................................................ 3

Part I – PRELIMINARY

1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Sample Act.

2. Interpretation
In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires—
    "Authority" means the Sample Authority established under section 3;
    "Board" means the Board of the Authority.

Part II – ESTABLISHMENT

There is established, for the purposes of this Act, the Sample Authority,
which shall be a body corporate with perpetual succession and a common
seal, capable of suing and being sued in its corporate name.

3. Establishment of the Authority
The Authority shall consist of a Board appointed by the Minister in
accordance with the provisions of this Act and shall be responsible for
the administration of the functions conferred upon it.

3A. Powers of the Authority
The Authority may, for the purpose of performing its functions under this
Act, acquire and hold property, enter into contracts, and do all such
other things as are necessary for the proper discharge of its functions.

Part III – FINANCE

4. Funds of the Authority
The funds of the Authority shall consist of monies appropriated by
Parliament, grants, donations, and any other monies lawfully received.

4A. [Repealed by Act No. 5 of 2010, s. 2.]

4B. Annual estimates
The Authority shall, before the commencement of each financial year,
cause to be prepared estimates of its revenue and expenditure for that
year and shall submit the same to the Minister for approval.
